description: A threat intelligence feed has identified a malicious IP address scanning the network. The agent must block it.

nodes.task_description: Receive the malicious IP address from the threat feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the IP to be blocked.

nodes.task_description: Apply a firewall rule on all edge routers to drop traffic from the malicious IP.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully deploys the new firewall rule.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the rule is active and traffic from the IP is being dropped.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the firewall logs and confirms traffic from the IP is no longer present.
